name: Bun (Go SQL Query Builder and ORM)

performance.notes: Thin wrapper over database/sql; minimal overhead

agent_readiness.notes: Go SQL query builder and lightweight ORM. import 'github.com/uptrace/bun'. import 'github.com/uptrace/bun/dialect/pgdialect'. sqldb := sql.Open('pgx', dsn). db := bun.NewDB(sqldb, pgdialect.New()). type User struct { bun.BaseModel `bun:'table:users'`; ID int64 `bun:'id,pk,autoincrement'`; Name string `bun:'name,notnull'` }. db.NewInsert().Model(&user).Exec(ctx). db.NewSelect().Model(&users).Where('id > ?', 10).Scan(ctx). db.NewUpdate().Model(&user).Set('name = ?', name).Where('id = ?', id).Exec(ctx). db.NewDelete().Model(&user).Where('id = ?', id).Exec(ctx). Bulk insert: db.NewInsert().Model(&users).On('CONFLICT DO NOTHING').Exec(ctx). Relations: HasMany, BelongsTo, M2M via struct tags. Migrations: bunmigrations. Hooks. Soft delete. Dialects: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, MSSQL.

gotchas: Successor to go-pg (PostgreSQL-only) — bun supports multiple databases
go-pg users: migration path from go-pg to bun exists but requires work
Less popular than GORM for Go ORM use
Relations via struct tags can be complex to configure
Type-safe query builder but still returns interface{} in some places
best_when: Go database code wanting SQL query builder ergonomics with ORM features
When GORM's magic is too heavy and raw database/sql is too verbose
PostgreSQL Go projects (excellent pgx dialect support)
avoid_when: Teams already using GORM (different conventions, migration cost)
When sqlc's type-safe compiled queries are preferred over ORM
Simple CRUD apps where GORM's batteries are worth the weight
summary: Bun is a Go SQL query builder and lightweight ORM. bun.NewDB(sqldb, pgdialect.New()); db.NewInsert().Model(&user).Exec(ctx); db.NewSelect().Model(&users).Where('id > ?', 10).Scan(ctx). Relations, bulk insert, soft delete. BSD-2-Clause by uptrace. Successor to go-pg. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, MSSQL. Less popular than GORM. Best for PostgreSQL Go projects wanting SQL ergonomics without GORM magic.
